rationale: The cited paper appears highly relevant to the citing study’s core setting and constructs: both analyze individual-level multichannel retail behavior with marketing communications (catalog/email) and channel outcomes (catalog/web vs online/in-store). The citing paper also uses a related customer-level Tobit-style framework with heterogeneity, making the cited work a plausible methodological/foundational source rather than a generic mention. Given this strong conceptual and modeling overlap, this pair should be kept for full relation judgment.
